title: Luffy Breaks Kuro’s Perfect Plan
description: On pages 9–11, the battle for Syrup Village intensifies as the Straw Hats, Usopp, and the village’s defenders confront Kuro’s pirates.
scene: The quiet village becomes a battlefield, with Usopp’s lies turning into real courage and the Straw Hats forcing Kuro’s plan to unravel.

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: I'm sick and tired...

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Making Plans for you neck- less morons...

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: As my name became more and more notorious,

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: The government's Marines and professional bounty hunters kept coming after me,

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: That really started to annoy me...

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: That's why on that day, three years ago,

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: I decided to kill myself...

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: THA... that day...

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: It's that... that inci- dent....!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: First- mate Jango!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: What is it?

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Captain Kuro is looking for you!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: JANGO...

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: The 100 plans KURO (3 years ago)

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: I want to leave the ship...

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: What are you talking about?!

dialogue.speaker: Black Cat Pirate
dialogue.text: But this is YOUR SHIP! And you're the captain!

dialogue.speaker: Black Cat Pirate
dialogue.text: You can be the next captain

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: I don't think I'm suited for a pirate's life

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: I'm sick of this chaotic lifestyle

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Captain Kuro!! Captain Kuro!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: A Marine ship is spotted to the north!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Again!? This is the third time this week!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Whaa... they're firing at us!

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: See! They've come again

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: We don't have a choice

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: We're doing things that get us hunted

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Because of that, you've become notorious

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Yes... it's the name that draws them here

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: That's why I decided not to be Captain Kuro anymore

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Stop kidding your- self! You'll be hunted down by the government all your life until you're dead

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Then I will die and make myself disappear from the face of the earth

dialogue.speaker: Kuro
dialogue.text: Captain Kuro, what do we do about the marines? Should we blast them with the cannons?!

summary: This part pushes the arc from conspiracy into open battle, testing Usopp’s courage and the Straw Hats’ trust in him.
